author: Ethan
name: Late Bank QAT + 2048 Train / 4096 Eval
blurb: Late int6 STE fake-quant applied to parameter bank weights (Q, K, V, O, MLP) during warmdown. Trains at 2048 context for speed (~7200 steps), evaluates at 4096 for better BPB. Full MLP (3.0x) with bank QAT improving weight compressibility under int6+lzma export.
